mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resignation ( emp_id, resignation_date, resignation_type, resignation_reason, handover_plan, contact_after, agreement, status, request_date ) VALUES ( #{empId}, #{resignationDate}, #{resignationType}, #{resignationReason}, #{handoverPlan}, #{contactAfter}, #{agreement}, '대기', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM resignation ORDER BY request_date DESC
